description_text: Product Description 2Pcs Universal Car Rear Bumper Fin Canard Splitter Diffuser Spoiler Anti-crash Wrap Angle Carbon Fiber Look Add our listing to Watchlist Or Add to Cart , you will get more discount Features: Brand New and Good Quality Universal fit for most of cars Material: High Quality ABS Size: Please Check the size on the Picture Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber Notice: Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit. Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper. Professional installation is highly recommended. Package Included: 2 x Rear Lip Wrap Angle Splitters ( Screws Including ) Payment Returns Contact Us Shipping We accept payment by PayPal only ! Payment should be completed within 5 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. e-check from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.Your order will be usually shipped out the same or next business days once the payment is made and cleared. Welcome to our Store ~
